acme.description: ACME addon without CF credentials - verifies hookscript and dispatcher setup

oidc-ssl.description: Dual addon: SSL + OIDC authentication via Zitadel

reconf-addons-on.description: Reconfigure: enable SSL + OIDC addons on existing container

reconf-addons-off.description: Reconfigure: disable both SSL + OIDC addons
